case_title: YU CONG CHEN ET AL VS. IDALIA LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF - STATUS UPDATE ON REQUIRED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YU CONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YU CONG LIU, SOPHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED MAY-02-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SOPHIA LIU (PER JULY-10-2017 ORDER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YU CONG
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SOPHIA LIU (PER JULY-10-2017 ORDER); FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, YU CONG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED JUL-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 - CONTINUE ORDER FOR 08/14/217 SERVED JUL-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AND GUARDIAN AD LITEM YU CONG CHEN WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW. PLAINTIFF SOPHIA LIU WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IDALIA LOPEZ WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, YU CONG LIU, SOPHIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, IDALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-14-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS YU CONG CHEN AND SOFIA LIU APPEARED THROUGH CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT IDALIA LOPEZ APPEARED. SERVICE OF CLAIM REQUIRED OR IF VALID, PROCESS SERVER PETER YEE MUST APPEAR. PLAINTIFF TO FILE PETITION FOR GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-14-2017 AT 1:30PM.
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. THE COURT ORDERS THAT YU CONG CHEN IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR: SOPOHIA LIU, A MINOR.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2017 - JUDGMENT.
